author: Haroen Viaene
subject: fix(dependencies): update typescript (#5454)
body:
* fix(dependencies): update typescript

It seems like notably SpeechRecognition is no longer builtin.

Some other more strict behaviour shouldn't have an impact on users.

I didn't update api-extractor, as it's not yet depending on the latest typescript, and updating seemed to break something in the configuration I didn't feel like figuring out :D

* typescript is smarter
